scripts.build: npm run build:admin && npm run build:issue && npm run build:dashboard && npm run build:action && npm run build:project
scripts.build:admin: cross-env REACT_APP_ENTRY=admin node scripts/move-build.js && cross-env REACT_APP_ENTRY=admin react-scripts build && cross-env REACT_APP_ENTRY=admin node scripts/move-build.js
scripts.build:project: cross-env REACT_APP_ENTRY=project node scripts/move-build.js && cross-env REACT_APP_ENTRY=project react-scripts build && cross-env REACT_APP_ENTRY=project node scripts/move-build.js
scripts.build:issue: cross-env REACT_APP_ENTRY=issue node scripts/move-build.js && cross-env REACT_APP_ENTRY=issue react-scripts build && cross-env REACT_APP_ENTRY=issue node scripts/move-build.js
scripts.build:dashboard: cross-env REACT_APP_ENTRY=dashboard node scripts/move-build.js && cross-env REACT_APP_ENTRY=dashboard react-scripts build && cross-env REACT_APP_ENTRY=dashboard node scripts/move-build.js
scripts.build:action: cross-env REACT_APP_ENTRY=action node scripts/move-build.js && cross-env REACT_APP_ENTRY=action react-scripts build && cross-env REACT_APP_ENTRY=action node scripts/move-build.js
